steps.title: Use Damon's memory problem
steps.content: Damon loses his memory whenever he sleeps, so he writes down important experiences before sleeping. The blank should describe saving those experiences from being lost.

steps.title: Choose the save-from-loss word
steps.content: A means mistrust, C means propose, and D means form a mental image or invent. The needed word means keep or save, which matches why Damon records the experiences. The answer is B.
